recap: Created kitty-tab-switch script that switches focus to a tab by ID via kitty @ focus-tab
Created kitty-pwd script that extracts cwd of the focused window from kitty @ ls JSON output
Made kitty-reload write source path (worktree root or OROSHI_ROOT) into Reload Beacon instead of empty touch
Made reload.py read source path from Reload Beacon and load modules via spec_from_file_location instead of importlib.reload
Diagnosed and fixed attention auto-clear: kitty holds GIL between render cycles blocking Timer threads; replaced with poll-based approach + dummy timer to keep render cycles alive
